title: Linux Process Execution from /dev/shm
description: Detects execution of processes from /dev/shm (shared memory filesystem). This in-memory filesystem is frequently used by attackers to stage and execute payloads without touching disk.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and ((msg like '*/dev/shm/*'))
falsepositives: Some legitimate applications use /dev/shm for inter-process communication
